14 MeV neutrons flux of order 7.E+10 n/(cm2*sec).
3 x 3 cm sealed plastic bags containing 0.5 - 1. g of
Efficiency 7 % measured with respect to NaI crystal of
76 mm x 76 mm placed at 25 cm distance from the source.
Co-60 (800 - 3600 keV) were used for efficiency
flux (3-6)*10**10 n/cm2/sec, see details in Table 1.
Codes Multi-8 and SAMPO were used.
Relative yields were determined by peak areas.
Decay data are given in Table 3 of FRNC-TH-470,1973,
decay schemes are on Fig.8 a-d.
